CC Pin Floor Sweep

Playground: workflows still pinning @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.148 (58 releases below the stamped floor) bumped to 2.1.206. Completes the deferred item from PR #2911 (skill-eval.yml was the pattern).

shared/cc-support.json supported_floor = 2.1.206 (stamped — never hand-edited) │ └──▶ workflow pins must equal the floor ──▶ this sweep
WorkflowBeforeAfterInstall pattern (kept intact)
plugin-validation.yml2.1.1482.1.206--ignore-scripts + guarded install.cjs

ci-sentinel.yml2.1.1482.1.206plain install

Gate: actionlint — zero new findings (only line-number shifts) Gate: grep — no 2.1.148 left anywhere in .github/ Floor source: shared/cc-support.json
